name: Statement of Establishment Of the Grassroots Resistance Front Of Right-Seekers – Handala
message: In the Name of God, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful Statement of Establishment  Of the Grassroots Resistance Front  Of Right-Seekers – Handala We, a collective of popular, cultural, scientific, legal and cyber activists, inspired by the name “Handala,” the symbol of the awakened conscience of the Islamic nation, now officially announce our existence…
